prompt: Create a photorealistic studio head-and-shoulders portrait of a heavyset East Asian man in his 20s with an intimidating middle-manager aura facing straight toward the camera. He has a broad round face, small serious eyes, neutral unsmiling mouth, and a stern silent-pressure expression. His hair is short and thick with bleached golden blond on top and darker black sides, slightly messy and textured. Add exactly one small plant sprout growing from the top center of his head: a short green stem with exactly two glossy oval leaves. Dress him in a formal black business suit jacket, crisp white dress shirt, and gray and black diagonal striped necktie. Use a plain light gray studio background, centered symmetrical composition, cropped from chest to just above the sprout, passport-photo-like framing, sharp focus, realistic skin texture, even soft front lighting, high-resolution editorial portrait style. No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra accessories, no additional plants or leaves.
